---
title: ""
author: ""
format: 
  docx:
    prefer-html: true
    reference-doc: template.docx

editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: initialisation
#| echo: false 
#| warning: false 
#| message: false 
 
# Packages 
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(kableExtra) 
library(ggplot2) 
library(tidyr)
library(glue)
library(stringr)

library(flextable)
library(officer)

# option 
# pour empêcher quarto d'appliquer automatiquement son propre style, alignement, pagination, etc.)
options(knitr.table.html.attr = "quarto-disable-processing=true") 
```

```{r}
#| label: parametres
#| echo: false
#| warning: false 
#| message: false 
#| eval: false
# Recuperation des parametres
code_ville <- str_pad(params$p_ville, width = 2, pad = "0")
periode_analyse <- params$p_periode 
```

```{r}
#| label: preparation_donnees
#| echo: false 
#| warning: false 
#| message: false 
#| eval: false

# sous-prog_traitement_donnees
source(file="Preparation_donnees_analyse.R")
```

![](en_tete.jpg)



## En juin 2025, l'indice des prix à la consommation des ménages de la ville de Tanger a augmenté de 0,5% par rapport


## Ensemble

```{r}
#| label: ensemble
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| eval: false

# kable(ipc_ensemble,
#       col.names = c("Secteur d'activité",
#                     "Evolution mensuelle",
#                     "Evolution annuelle"),
#       format.args = list(decimal.mark = ","),
#       escape = F,
#       caption ="<span style='font-size:20px'>Evolutions mensuelles et annuelles<br>par grand secteur d'activité</span>") %>%
#   kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped",
#                 full_width = FALSE,
#                 position = "left",
#                 font_size = 14) %>%
#   column_spec(1, width = "6cm") %>%
#   row_spec(1, bold = T)

ft <- flextable(ipc_ensemble)
ft <- set_header_labels(ft,
                        libelle_diff = "Secteur d'activité",
                        evol_mens = "Evolution mensuelle",
                        evol_an = "Evolution annuelle")
ft <- width(ft, j = "libelle_diff", width = 2.2) 
ft <- width(ft, j = c("evol_mens","evol_an"), width = 1.3) 
ft <- set_formatter(ft,
                    evol_mens = function(x) format(x, decimal.mark = ","),
                    evol_an = function(x) format(x, decimal.mark = ","))
ft <- bold(ft, part = "header")
ft <- bold(ft, i = 1, part = "body")
ft <- bg(ft, i = seq(1, nrow(ipc_ensemble), by = 2), bg = "gray90", part = "body")
ft
```

## Secteur alimentaire

## Evolution dans le temps de l'IPC

### Evolution annuelle

```{r}
#| label: graphique_annuel
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 3
#| fig-align: left
#| eval: false

ggplot2::ggplot(data=ipc_evol_annuel_gra, 
                aes(x=x_date, 
                    y=evol,
                    group=1 )) +
  geom_line(color = "red",linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, col="black", linewidth=1) +
  geom_point(size=1.5)  +
  xlab("Période") +
  ylab("Evolution (%)") +
  ggtitle("Graphique de l'évolution annuelle en %")  +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size= 16) , 
       axis.title = element_text(size= 13) ,
       axis.text.x = element_text(size= 10),
       axis.text.y = element_text(size= 10) )

```

```{r}
#| label: tab_graphique_annuel
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| eval: false

opts <- options(knitr.kable.NA = "")

# ipc_evol_annuel %>%
#   select(x_date,ipc,evol) %>%
#   kable(col.names = c("Date",
#                       "IPC", 
#                       "Evolution annuelle" ),
#         format.args = list(decimal.mark = ","),
#         escape = F,
#         caption ="<span style='font-size:20px'>Tableau de l'évolution annuelle en %</span>") %>%
#   kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped",
#                 full_width = FALSE,
#                 position = "left",
#                 font_size = 14)  %>%
#   column_spec(c(1,2,3), width = "3cm") %>%
#   column_spec(2,color = "gray")

ipc_evol_annuel %>%
  select(x_date,ipc,evol)
```

## Evolution mensuelle

# Tableau de synthèse

<!-- # TEST -->

```{r}
#| label: test
#| eval: false
print(code_ville)
print(periode_analyse)
print(l_mois)
```
